---
name: Content gap / 内容缺口
about: Request missing formulas, chapters, examples, proof routes, or exam-use explanations
title: "[Content] "
labels: content, needs-review
---

## Missing content / 缺少什么

- Subject:
- Chapter or topic:
- Formula, theorem, method, example type, or review workflow:

## Why it matters / 为什么重要

Explain how this helps 考研数学一 review: frequent exam pattern, common mistake, prerequisite concept, or useful comparison.

## Expected card quality / 期望补充质量

- [ ] Formula or statement
- [ ] Conditions and parameter conventions
- [ ] One-sentence intuition
- [ ] Exam usage steps
- [ ] Mini proof or derivation route
- [ ] Short worked example
- [ ] Common mistake warning
- [ ] Related formulas or lab if relevant

## Suggested sources / 建议来源

Textbook section, official syllabus item, reliable reference, or your own derivation.

## Notes / 备注

Add screenshots, wrong-problem context, or links if helpful. Do not paste long copyrighted textbook passages.
